sources.name: UK Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office
sources.attribution: Contains public sector information licensed under the Open Government Licence v3.0
sources.network: Fetched only when you request official advice
sources.authority: Official UK government advice; written for UK nationals

sources.name: U.S. Department of State
sources.network: Fetched only when you request official advice
sources.authority: Official U.S. government advice; written for U.S. nationals

sources.name: Government of Canada — Global Affairs Canada
sources.attribution: Government of Canada — Global Affairs Canada
sources.network: Fetched only when you request official advice
sources.authority: Official Canadian government advice; written for Canadian nationals

sources.name: Auswärtiges Amt (Germany)
sources.endpoint: German Federal Foreign Office OpenData travel warnings
sources.network: Fetched only when you request official advice
sources.authority: Official German government advice; source wording may remain German

sources.name: U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
sources.attribution: U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
sources.authority: Official U.S. public-health notices; informational, not personal medical advice

sources.name: Open-Meteo
sources.use: Geocoding, weather, climate normals, and air quality
sources.license: CC BY 4.0; hosted free tier has non-commercial terms
sources.network: Fetched only when you request a weather or destination snapshot
sources.authority: Forecast and historical observations; never safety or itinerary authority

sources.name: European Central Bank
sources.attribution: Exchange rates from the European Central Bank
sources.authority: Reference rates, not a quoted retail conversion price

sources.name: Nager.Date
sources.network: Fetched only when you request holidays
sources.authority: Informational calendar data; never entry or closure authority

sources.name: Wikipedia / Wikimedia
sources.network: Fetched only when you request an about-place summary
sources.authority: Community-written context; never safety, price, or opening-hours authority

sources.name: Overture Maps Foundation
sources.network: Downloaded only when you request a city pack
sources.authority: Open place data; recommendations do not assert live hours, prices, or availability

sources.name: Wikivoyage
sources.network: Downloaded only when you request a city pack
sources.authority: Community-written travel context; shown separately from place data

sources.name: Protomaps Basemap / OpenStreetMap
sources.endpoint: Pinned Protomaps PMTiles build, clipped and rehosted on GitHub Releases
sources.network: Downloaded only when you request a city pack's offline map
sources.authority: Basemap context; not routing, access, or opening-hours authority

sources.name: GeoNames
sources.network: Bundled with the app; no runtime request

sources.name: OurAirports
sources.network: Bundled with the app; no runtime request
sources.authority: Geographic airport proximity only; not flight availability
